'''Bethal''' was a [[planet]] located in [[Pelagia Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] in the Colonies region. It was the primary [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bethal system/Legends|Bethal system]]. It housed the headquarters of [[Bethal AgriCorp]], and its main export was [[apocia]] hardwood timber. An infestation of [[Greddleback termite/Legends|greddleback termites]] caused the economy of the planet - which was based on [[apocia]] hardwood timber - to go under. Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tendd]] declared the planet a disaster world, and helped bring [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] funds to the planet in an effort to restore the apocia. The world also diversified its crops in an effort to revive its economy while the apocia forests regrew.<ref name="AJ11">{{JournalCite|11|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>
